title: AN ACT TO LIMIT THE IMPORTATION OF FOREIGN LEAF TOBACCO

chunks.text:
H. No. 1850 / 48 OG No. 5, 1703 (May, 1952)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 698, May 09, 1952 ]

AN ACT TO LIMIT THE IMPORTATION OF FOREIGN LEAF TOBACCO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The importation of foreign leaf tobacco shall be limited to the following schedule:

For 1952âseventy-five per cent of the total importation in 1950.

For 1953âfifty per cent of the total importation in 1950.

For 1954âforty per cent of the total importation in 1950.

Succeeding yearsâtwenty-five per cent of the total importation in 1950.

Provided, however,

That nothing herein shall be construed to limit the importation of wrapper leaf tobacco for cigars.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 9, 1952.
